Test Case Description: Verify that deselecting the checkbox clears all pre-filled transporter information fields.
Expected Result: All transporter information fields are cleared when the checkbox is deselected.

Test Case Description:
Verify the Information fields remain empty when the checkbox is not selected when user opens the create dispatch drawer by clicking it in Secondary Sales
drawer
Expected Result: Transporter information fields remain empty until the checkbox is selected.

Test Case Description: Verify the Pre-filled checbox is available or not
Expected Result: Pre filled checkbox should not be available

Test Case Description: Verify the default data in all the field and upload doc field
Expected Result: All the fields and upload doc should be blank

Test Case Description: Verify that only Vehicle Number and Driver Mobile Number fields are enabled when Transport Cost is 0.
Expected Result: Only Vehicle Number and Driver Mobile Number fields are enabled; all other transporter-related fields are disabled.

Test Case Description: Verify that all other transporter-related fields and documents are disabled when Transport Cost is 0.
Expected Result: Fields and documents, except Vehicle Number and Driver Mobile Number, are disabled when Transport Cost is 0.

Test Case Description: Verify that the Vehicle Number and Driver Mobile Number fields accept valid input.
Expected Result: Vehicle Number and Driver Mobile Number fields successfully accept valid input.

Test Case Description: Verify that the Weighted Average Price is correctly calculated as Total Value of Consignment / Total Weight of Consignment.
Expected Result: Weighted Average Price is calculated and displayed correctly as per the formula.

Test Case Description: Verify that the Weighted Average Price is displayed during the Create Consignment flow.
Expected Result: Weighted Average Price is visible during the Create Consignment process.

Test Case Description: Verify that the Weighted Average Price updates dynamically if Total Value or Total Weight changes.
Expected Result: Weighted Average Price updates automatically and correctly when Total Value or Total Weight is modified.

Test Case Description: Verify the Weighted Average Price is not displayed if either Total Value or Total Weight is missing.
Expected Result: Weighted Average Price is hidden when either Total Value or Total Weight is missing.

Test Case Description: Verify that the Finance Executive/SHP can search by PO ID in the "Outbound" module.
Expected Result: Finance Executive/SHPcan search by PO ID, and relevant results are displayed in the Outbound module.

Test Case Description: Verify that the correct consignment details are displayed when a valid PO ID is entered.
Expected Result: Accurate consignment details are shown for a valid PO ID.

Test Case Description: Verify that no results are shown when an invalid PO ID is entered.
Expected Result: No results are displayed, and an appropriate message is shown for an invalid PO ID.

Test Case Description: Verify the system handles cases where multiple consignments are associated with the same PO ID.
Expected Result: All consignments linked to the PO ID are displayed correctly.

Test Case Description: Verify that CO IDs in the Payments module are hyperlinked.
Expected Result: CO IDs in the Payments module are displayed as clickable hyperlinks.

Test Case Description: Verify that CO IDs in the Delivery module are hyperlinked.
Expected Result: CO IDs in the Delivery module are displayed as clickable hyperlinks.

Test Case Description: Verify that clicking on a CO ID hyperlink navigates to the correct order details page.
Expected Result: Clicking the CO ID hyperlink redirects to the corresponding order details page.

Test Case Description: Verify that the CO ID hyperlink opens in the same tab by default.
Expected Result: CO ID hyperlinks open in the same tab unless specified otherwise.

Test Case Description: Verify that the CO ID hyperlink opens in a new tab if specified.
Expected Result: CO ID hyperlinks open in a new tab when configured to do so.

Test Case Description: Verify that Gross, Net Weight, Bag Deduction, and Number of Bags are mandatory fields in the Create Consignment flow.
Expected Result: Validation errors are shown for missing values in Gross, Net Weight, Bag Deduction, or Number of Bags fields.

Test Case Description: Verify that a Weight Slip document is required during consignment creation.
Expected Result: Validation error is displayed if the Weight Slip document is not uploaded.

Test Case Description: Verify that Delivery Challan is required for dispatch.
Expected Result: Dispatch is blocked until the Delivery Challan is uploaded.

Test Case Description: Verify that Vehicle Number and Driver Mobile Number are always mandatory.
Expected Result: Validation errors are shown if Vehicle Number or Driver Mobile Number fields are left blank.

Test Case Description: Verify that Mandi Tax documents are optional and do not block consignment creation if not uploaded.
Expected Result: Users can proceed without uploading Mandi Tax documents, and no validation errors occur.

Test Case Description: Verify that dispatch is blocked if any compulsory weight-related details or documents are missing.
Expected Result: Dispatch cannot proceed, and appropriate error messages are displayed if required fields or documents are missing.

Test Case Description: Verify that appropriate error messages are displayed for missing mandatory fields.
Expected Result: Clear and accurate error messages are shown for missing mandatory fields.

Test Case Description: Verify that Finance Executive/SHP cannot proceed if Gross, Net Weight, or Number of Bags is invalid.
Expected Result: System prevents progression, and error messages are displayed for invalid weight-related fields.

Test Case Description: Verify that the system gracefully handles scenarios where required transporter data is unavailable in the PO.
Expected Result: System displays appropriate fallback options or error messages when required transporter data is missing in the PO.

Test Case Description: Verify that the checkbox for pre-filling transporter information is not displayed for multiple POs.
Expected Result: Checkbox for pre-filling transporter information is not displayed when there are multiple POs in picking details.

Test Case Description: Verify that Weighted Average Price is displayed correctly in the Payments module.
Expected Result: Weighted Average Price is accurately calculated and displayed in the Payments module.

Test Case Description: Verify that Weighted Average Price is displayed correctly in the Delivery module.
Expected Result: Weighted Average Price is accurately calculated and displayed in the Delivery module.

Test Case Description: Verify that changes to transporter fields reflect accurately across all relevant modules.
Expected Result: Updates to transporter fields are synchronized and reflected correctly across all modules.

Test Case Description: Verify that searching by PO ID works consistently across Outbound, Payments, and Delivery modules.
Expected Result: Searching by PO ID provides consistent and accurate results across all relevant modules.
